name: ◁ Shorbat Lsan El AsfoorMEATBALL & ORZO SOUP

ingredients.item:
MEATBALLS
2/3 pound (300 g) lean ground beef
½ teaspoon kosher salt
ingredients.original:
MEATBALLS
2/3 pound (300 g) lean ground beef
½ teaspoon kosher salt

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon kosher salt, plus more if needed
ingredients.original: 1 teaspoon kosher salt, plus more if needed

ingredients.item:
FOR GARNISHING AND SERVING
¼ cup (13 g) finely chopped fresh parsley
Pita bread
ingredients.original:
FOR GARNISHING AND SERVING
¼ cup (13 g) finely chopped fresh parsley
Pita bread

ingredients.item: 1 TO MAKE THE MEATBALLS: In a medium bowl, combine all the meatball ingredients beef, salt, pepper, seven spice, onion and garlic powders, paprika, and bread crumbs and mix well using your hands. Roll into ½-inch (13 mm) meatballs.
ingredients.original: 1 TO MAKE THE MEATBALLS: In a medium bowl, combine all the meatball ingredients beef, salt, pepper, seven spice, onion and garlic powders, paprika, and bread crumbs and mix well using your hands. Roll into ½-inch (13 mm) meatballs.

ingredients.item: 2 In a medium pot, heat the oil over medium heat. Add the meatballs, working in batches, and sear for 2 to 3 minutes, until golden on most sides. Transfer to a plate.
ingredients.original: 2 In a medium pot, heat the oil over medium heat. Add the meatballs, working in batches, and sear for 2 to 3 minutes, until golden on most sides. Transfer to a plate.

ingredients.item: 3 TO MAKE THE SOUP: In the same pot, add the oil, onion, and salt and cook, stirring often, for 5 to 6 minutes, until softened and translucent. Add the garlic and cook, stirring often, for a few minutes, or until fragrant. Add the tomato paste and stir for a few seconds.
ingredients.original: 3 TO MAKE THE SOUP: In the same pot, add the oil, onion, and salt and cook, stirring often, for 5 to 6 minutes, until softened and translucent. Add the garlic and cook, stirring often, for a few minutes, or until fragrant. Add the tomato paste and stir for a few seconds.

ingredients.item: 4 Pour in the broth and add the meatballs back into the pot. Cover the pot with the lid and bring to a boil over high heat. Once boiling, reduce the heat to medium and let simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
ingredients.original: 4 Pour in the broth and add the meatballs back into the pot. Cover the pot with the lid and bring to a boil over high heat. Once boiling, reduce the heat to medium and let simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.

ingredients.item: 5 Remove the lid and add the orzo. Stir well, then cover and let cook for 15 minutes. Taste and adjust the soup for salt if necessary. Check the orzo to ensure it is cooked to al dente, or softer if desired.
ingredients.original: 5 Remove the lid and add the orzo. Stir well, then cover and let cook for 15 minutes. Taste and adjust the soup for salt if necessary. Check the orzo to ensure it is cooked to al dente, or softer if desired.

ingredients.item: 6 Ladle into bowls, garnish with chopped parsley, and serve with pita bread.
ingredients.original: 6 Ladle into bowls, garnish with chopped parsley, and serve with pita bread.
